hooks.command: terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")" -message '許可を求めています' -sound Glass -sender com.anthropic.claudefordesktop -activate com.microsoft.VSCode
terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")" -message '入力待ちです' -sound Hero -sender com.anthropic.claudefordesktop -activate com.microsoft.VSCode
terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")" -message '処理が完了しました' -sound Default -sender com.anthropic.claudefordesktop -activate com.microsoft.VSCode
